findings.explanation: Write access to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md is declared in Step 5 workflow. While scoped and user-confirmed, modifying CLAUDE.md affects all future Claude sessions. The skill asks permission before writing, which mitigates the risk.

Data flow: conversation corrections → ~/.claude/skill-corrections/*.md AND ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. All destinations are local, dedicated directories. No network egress. CLAUDE.md modification is gated behind user confirmation.
